errors.timeout: Connection to the server timed out. Please try again.
errors.networkTimeout: A network error or server timeout occurred.

steps.narrative_render: Making the itinerary easier to read...
steps.semantic_planPreparing: Setting the overall flow for the trip...

pause.recovery_required: Adjusting how the candidate spots are assembled
pause.runtime_budget_exhausted: Preparing to continue with the next step

errors.network: A network error occurred. Check your connection and try again.
errors.timeout: The server took too long to respond. Please try again.

generationCodes.draft_generation_timeout: Spot selection took too long. Try again with slightly narrower trip preferences.
generationCodes.draft_generation_invalid_output: The planner returned an incomplete trip skeleton, so the itinerary could not be completed. Please try again.
generationCodes.draft_generation_missing_meal: The generated day was missing a meal block, so that day could not be completed. Please retry with slightly adjusted conditions.
generationCodes.draft_generation_insufficient_stops: The generated day did not contain enough real stops to complete the itinerary. Please retry with slightly adjusted conditions.
generationCodes.draft_generation_provider_error: There was a problem communicating with the AI service. Please try again in a moment.
generationCodes.narrative_generation_timeout: Finishing the itinerary took too long. Please try again.
generationCodes.narrative_generation_invalid_output: The narrative step returned an incomplete result, so the itinerary text could not be completed. Please try again.
generationCodes.narrative_generation_provider_error: There was a problem communicating with the AI service while finishing the itinerary. Please try again in a moment.
generationCodes.finalize_incomplete_session_contract: There was a problem while preparing the final itinerary. Please try again.
generationCodes.high_unverified_ratio: Some spots could not be verified. We recommend confirming details in advance at your destination.
generationCodes.draft_generate:draft_generation_timeout: Spot selection took too long. Try again with slightly narrower trip preferences.
generationCodes.draft_generate:draft_generation_invalid_: The planner returned an incomplete trip skeleton, so the itinerary could not be completed. Please try again.
generationCodes.draft_generate:draft_generation_provider: There was a problem communicating with the AI service. Please try again in a moment.
generationCodes.draft_generate:draft_generation_strategy: The same planning error repeated for this day, so generation was stopped to avoid looping. Please retry with slightly adjusted conditions.
generationCodes.draft_generate:draft_generation_contract: The planner returned a day payload in the wrong shape, so this day's generation was restarted. Please try again.
generationCodes.draft_generate:draft_generation_outline_: The slot outline came back in the wrong shape, so the planner could not continue building this day. Please try again.
generationCodes.draft_generate:draft_generation_constrai: The constrained recovery payload came back in the wrong shape, so generation for this day was stopped to avoid looping. Please retry with slightly adjusted conditions.
generationCodes.draft_generate:draft_generation_missing_: The generated day was missing a meal block, so that day could not be completed. Please retry with slightly adjusted conditions.
generationCodes.draft_generate:draft_generation_insuffic: The generated day did not contain enough real stops to complete the itinerary. Please retry with slightly adjusted conditions.
generationCodes.draft_generate:missing_afternoon_activit: The itinerary is missing meaningful stops after lunch. Regenerate it so the day continues into the afternoon or evening.
generationCodes.draft_generate:activity_only_until_midda: The itinerary ends around midday. Regenerate it with real afternoon or evening activities.
generationCodes.draft_generate:insufficient_day_coverage: This day does not have enough coverage to feel complete. Regenerate it so the itinerary continues beyond the morning.
generationCodes.narrative_polish:narrative_generation_ti: There was not enough runtime left to finish the itinerary narrative. Please try again in a moment.
generationCodes.narrative_polish:narrative_generation_in: The narrative step returned an incomplete result, so the itinerary text could not be completed. Please try again.
generationCodes.narrative_polish:narrative_generation_pr: There was a problem communicating with the AI service while finishing the itinerary. Please try again in a moment.
generationCodes.finalize:finalize_incomplete_session_con: There was a problem while preparing the final itinerary. Please try again.
generationCodes.finalize:finalize_empty_itinerary: The itinerary was about to be saved with no days, so the save was stopped. Please try again.
generationCodes.finalize:finalize_incomplete_itinerary_d: The itinerary was missing one or more requested days, so saving was stopped. Please try again.
generationCodes.finalize:finalize_activity_only_until_mi: Saving was stopped because the itinerary effectively ended around midday. Regenerate it with real afternoon or evening activities.
generationCodes.draft_generate:draft_generate_incomplete: The planner draft did not cover every requested day, so generation was stopped. Please try again.
generationCodes.draft_format:draft_format_incomplete_day: A missing-day issue was found while formatting the itinerary draft. Please try again.
generationCodes.timeline_construct:timeline_construct_in: The timeline builder returned an itinerary with missing days. Please try again.
generationCodes.selective_verify:high_unverified_ratio: Some spots could not be verified. We recommend confirming details in advance at your destination.
generationCodes.run_processor_unexpected_error: An internal problem interrupted itinerary generation. Adjust the conditions slightly or try again in a moment.
generationCodes.pipeline_ai_output_error: A problem occurred while generating the itinerary. Please try again.
generationCodes.pipeline_timeout: The AI took too long to respond. Please try again.
generationCodes.pipeline_day_count_mismatch: There was a problem assembling the day-by-day schedule. Please try again.
generationCodes.pipeline_gate_failed: The itinerary failed a final consistency check. Please try again.

stepFailed.semantic_plan: AI spot selection failed. Please try again.
stepFailed.narrative_render: Failed to create the itinerary narrative. Please try again.
stepFailed.place_resolve: Location verification failed. Please try again.
stepFailed.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

warnings.title: Generated with limited verification
warnings.placeVerificationLimited: Google Places API has reached its usage limit, so some spot verification was skipped. Your itinerary was still generated, but you should recheck map locations and opening hours later.

title.modal: The itinerary could not be completed

description.banner: Your input has been kept. Resume from the same run or adjust the conditions before trying again.
description.modal: This failure is likely to repeat with the same conditions. You can return to the input form and revise the request.

actions.contactLink: Contact us if the issue persists

errors.limitExceeded: You have reached your usage limit

query.decided: A trip to enjoy {themes} in {destinations} with {companions}
